skills.name: WhatsApp
skills.description: WhatsApp channel via Baileys — QR auth, messaging, voice transcription, channel and business modes
skills.longDescription: Gives your Bloby a WhatsApp number. Connect via QR code, send and receive messages, handle voice notes with automatic transcription, and switch between personal (channel) and business modes. Built on Baileys — no Meta Business API needed. Credentials stay local on your device.

skills.name: Google Workspace
skills.description: Connects your Bloby to Google Workspace — Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Sheets, Docs via OAuth and the gws CLI
skills.longDescription: A setup skill that walks your Bloby through connecting to your Google account via OAuth 2.0. After a guided conversational setup (create a GCP project, paste credentials, pick services, authorize), your Bloby can read and send emails, manage calendar events, browse Drive, edit Sheets and Docs — all through the gws CLI. Credentials stay local on your device.

skills.name: Clinic Secretary
skills.description: Virtual secretary for medical clinics — scheduling, payments, patient memory, follow-ups via WhatsApp
skills.longDescription: Turns your Bloby into a virtual secretary for a medical clinic. Handles patient conversations via WhatsApp: appointment scheduling, Stripe payment links, cancellations, rescheduling, and patient memory across conversations. Runs in WhatsApp business mode with full security — patients never know they're talking to AI.

bundles.name: Doctor's Secretary Bundle
bundles.description: WhatsApp channel + virtual clinic secretary in one package
bundles.longDescription: Everything your Bloby needs to run a medical clinic's front desk. Includes the WhatsApp channel skill for connectivity and the Clinic Secretary skill for patient management. Your Bloby handles appointment scheduling, payment collection via Stripe, patient memory, and proactive follow-ups — all through WhatsApp.

blueprints.name: Standard Workspace (Light Theme)
blueprints.description: Light/dark theme toggle with full design system for your workspace
blueprints.longDescription: A comprehensive design blueprint that adds a light/dark theme toggle to your sidebar. Includes a full color palette for both themes, a React ThemeProvider, flash-prevention scripts, and theme-aware CSS utilities. Your Bloby reads the instructions, applies them once, and your workspace gets a polished dual-theme system.

blueprints.name: Bloby Backup
blueprints.description: Automated workspace backups — cron-based zip to Google Drive, email, or local download
blueprints.longDescription: Sets up a recurring backup cron for your workspace. Your Bloby walks you through choosing a schedule (daily, weekly, every 8 hours — whatever you want) and destinations: Google Drive folder, email attachment via Gmail, or a local download link. Backs up everything in workspace/ except node_modules. Includes a smart restore flow that protects your Bloby's memory files from accidental overwrite.

blueprints.name: Workspace Lock
blueprints.description: Add a PIN code or password lock screen to the workspace with localStorage sessions and agent-triggered reset
blueprints.longDescription: A lock screen blueprint for your workspace. Choose between a 6-digit PIN or a password. Once set, every new browser or device must enter the code to access the workspace. Known devices are remembered via localStorage so the user doesn't re-enter every time. If the user forgets, they can ask their Bloby to reset it. Includes ready-to-use React components, backend routes, scrypt hashing, and CSS animations.

services.name: Test Service
services.description: Returns a random markdown message. For testing the services system.
